title: Weekly Vessel Valuations Report, March 31 2026
summary:
Main
in Weekly Vessel Valuations Report 01/04/2026
Image reference: 2026-04-01_weekly-vessel-valuations-report-march-31-2026_img1.png
Bulkers: Bulker secondhand activity remained active on a week-on-week basis, though the broader Marchpicture tells a more cautious story. Sales are down 68% against the same month last year, as ongoing Middle East uncertainty has prompted many owners to adopt a wait-and-see approach. Values remained relatively stable across the Bulker sector.
